Search Twitter/X tweets with advanced filters. Returns up to 20 tweets per page, most recent first, with pagination. At least one filter required. Params: words, phrase, anyWords, noneWords, hashtags, from, to, mentioning, minReplies, minLikes, minReposts, since (YYYY-MM-DD), until, next_token. e.g. GET /tweets/search?words=bitcoin&from=elonmusk&minLikes=100. Returns X v2 API-compatible JSON.

postSlug.description: Post slug within the publication. `{postslug}` is a discovery placeholder.

publicationSlug.description: Publication slug. Real slugs load or import the post; `{publicationslug}` is a discovery placeholder.

postSlug.description: Post slug within the publication feed.

publicationSlug.description: Publication slug. Use a real slug to fetch/import a publication.

items.description: Pay $0.02 USDC to store a file for 7 days. Send filename, optional content_type, and base64-encoded file bytes as JSON. Max file size: 10 MB. Returns a token and a stable GET URL. Network: Base Mainnet. Each request stores one file and returns a retrieval token plus expiry timestamp.

example.message: File stored. Available at GET /file/a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890 for 7 days.

content_type.description: Optional MIME type such as 'image/png' or 'application/pdf'. If omitted, the server detects it from the filename extension.

data_base64.description: Base64-encoded file bytes for this upload. Decoded size must not exceed 10 MB.

filename.description: Original filename including extension (max 200 chars). Used for download naming and content-type detection.

items.description: Pay $0.01 USDC as a small donation or a simple live x402 integration test. Optional name and message are stored publicly and shown on GET /donations. Network: Base Mainnet. Each request records one donation and returns public feed links.

example.message_text: Donation recorded. Thank you for supporting Omniacs DAO.
example.name: Omniac

message.description: Optional public note stored with the donation and shown in the public feed (max 280 chars).

name.description: Optional public donor or agent name shown in the donation feed (max 80 chars).

policyTtlSeconds.description: Optional upload URL/form expiration in seconds, 60-86400. Use longer TTLs only when reserving an output slot for a downstream service.

tier.description: Site tier. Default 6-month tiers: 10mb ($0.02), 100mb ($0.20), 1gb ($2.00). Short-term 7-day workflow site tiers: short-10mb ($0.005), short-100mb ($0.02), short-1gb ($0.10). short-5gb is not supported for sites.

items.description: Simulate a read-only Ethereum contract call via eth_call - no transaction sent
Ethereum network info - chain ID, block height, and gas price in one batched RPC call (eth_chainId + eth_blockNumber + eth_gasPrice)
Pending Ethereum block - mempool transactions not yet mined, via eth_getBlockByNumber("pending")
ERC20 Transfer logs via eth_getLogs - decoded sender, recipient, and amount for a token or wallet
ENS resolve - turn a .eth name into an address, or an address into its primary .eth name, via eth_call on OneSource live Ethereum RPC
Ethereum chain ID (EIP-155) via eth_chainId - confirm which chain a network is on
Query Ethereum contract event logs via eth_getLogs - filter by contract, topic, and block range

x402 pre-flight: returns {ok, warnings, metadata} for any URL from the agentic.market catalog. Checks for zombie/dead/decoy/slow/new-provider signals. $0.001 USDC, the lowest amount the Coinbase CDP facilitator accepts.
Estimate the gas a transaction will consume via eth_estimateGas before signing it
Query Polymarket markets with filtering, sorting, and pagination
Total supply of an ERC20 or ERC721 token contract via totalSupply (eth_call)
Read a raw storage slot from any Ethereum contract via eth_getStorageAt
Look up the current owner of an ERC721 NFT by token_id via ownerOf (eth_call)
NFT metadata, traits, and image URI for any ERC721 or ERC1155 token - fetched via eth_call with IPFS resolution (OneSource live Ethereum RPC)
Live wallet balance - native ETH plus any ERC20 tokens in one call via eth_getBalance and balanceOf on OneSource Ethereum RPC
List every ERC721 NFT token_id a wallet owns in a collection via tokenOfOwnerByIndex (eth_call)
ERC20 token balance for any Ethereum wallet - USDC, USDT, DAI, or any token - via balanceOf (eth_call) on OneSource live Ethereum RPC
ERC1155 token balance via balanceOf (eth_call) - how many copies of a token_id a wallet holds
ERC20 allowance via allowance (eth_call) - how much a spender is approved to move from an owner's wallet
Quick pulse check from crypto Twitter. Breaking news, trending narratives, and sentiment shifts at a glance.

data.description: Digest object on success, error string on failure

extra.name: USD Coin
extra.serviceDescription: x402Factory Base endpoints for agents (notes, LLMs, TTS, Telegram, coin prices, payments, X profiles).

handle.description: X handle (username) without the @ prefix, for example WURKDOTFUN or statikheadz.
Normalized X handle that was requested.

price_usdc.description: Fixed price charged for this call in USDC (6 decimals).

profile.description: Full upstream X profile payload for the user, including core fields like id, rest_id, name, screen_name, description, avatar, location and counters.

tweet_count.description: Number of recent tweets returned (up to 10).

tweets.description: Array of up to 10 recent tweets with trimmed but useful metadata: id, text (max 3000 chars; longer texts are truncated), created_at, language, basic user info, engagement metrics, media and links.

handle.description: X handle (username) without the @ prefix, for example WURKDOTFUN or statikheadz.
Normalized X handle that was requested.

price_usdc.description: Fixed price charged for this call in USDC (6 decimals).

profile.description: Full upstream X profile payload for the user, including core fields like id, rest_id, name, screen_name, description, avatar, location and counters.

tweet_count.description: Number of recent tweets returned (up to 10).

tweets.description: Array of up to 10 recent tweets with trimmed but useful metadata: id, text (max 3000 chars; longer texts are truncated), created_at, language, basic user info, engagement metrics, media and links.

items.description: Pay $0.01 USDC to make an outbound HTTP request through the proxy. Supports all standard HTTP methods, custom headers (including auth), and JSON or raw bodies. Responses are returned as text or base64-encoded binary. Max response size 10 MB, timeout 30s. Each request performs one upstream fetch and returns the final URL plus response metadata.

body.description: Optional raw string request body. Mutually exclusive with body_json.

body_json.description: Optional JSON request body. Automatically sets Content-Type: application/json and is mutually exclusive with body.

headers.description: Optional custom upstream request headers as key→value string pairs.

method.description: HTTP method for this outbound request. Allowed: DELETE, GET, HEAD, OPTIONS, PATCH, POST, PUT

timeout.description: Optional upstream request timeout in seconds (max 30s).

url.description: Target public http:// or https:// URL to fetch.

items.description: Get the latest tweets (timeline) from a specific Twitter/X user by their username. Returns up to 20 tweets per page sorted by most recent first, with pagination support. Query params: username (string, required) - Twitter screen name; next_token (string, optional) - pagination cursor, e.g. GET /tweets/user?username=elonmusk. Returns X v2 API-compatible JSON.
Upload an image with payment and get a public URL. Accepts multipart form-data (field 'image') or JSON {"file": "<base64>"}. 5MB max, 1-year retention. PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP.

url.description: Public CDN URL of the hosted image

items.description: Get the latest tweets from a Twitter/X List by its numeric List ID. Returns ~100 tweets per page with pagination support. Query params: id (string, required) - numeric List ID; next_token (string, optional) - pagination cursor, e.g. GET /lists/tweets?id=84839422. Returns X v2 API-compatible JSON.
Neural and keyword web search. Optional category filter: company, research paper, news, pdf, github, tweet, personal site, linkedin profile, financial report.
Run the full safety and validation boundary pass: risk scan, JSON extraction, schema normalization, and deterministic receipt generation before an agent continues.

human_summary.headline: Allowed: the request passed Boundary Guard.
human_summary.operator_next_step: Use the normalized payload and keep the receipt with the downstream action.
human_summary.plain_english: Boundary Guard accepted the request. It scanned the submitted text, extracted the JSON, normalized it to the requested schema (count=4, active=true), and returned a receipt for this exact decision.
human_summary.receipt_explainer: Receipt 1f1dcb45a3e9… ties the policy version, input hash, normalized payload hash, and decision together. x402/payment response proves settlement when present; Boundary Guard receipt explains its own request handling and policy decision.
human_summary.transaction_summary: This transaction asked Boundary Guard to check one agent payload before it was trusted downstream. The outcome was allow: count=4, active=true.
what_happened: Risk scan: no blocked risk patterns were found.
JSON extraction: found a structured payload in the submitted text.
Schema check: normalized the payload to count=4, active=true.
Receipt: 1f1dcb45a3e9… records this decision under policy guard-v1.

items.description: List Polymarket events with filtering and sorting

Pay $0.05 USDC to seal up to 100 KB of text until a future date. Content is inaccessible via GET /open/{token} until unlock_at passes. An optional label is visible before unlock via GET /status/{token}. Max unlock date: 10 years from now. Network: Base Mainnet. Each request stores one sealed text capsule and returns a token for later retrieval.

body.content: The winner of the 2028 US election will be...
body.label: 2028 election prediction

content.description: Text content to seal until unlock_at. Max 100 KB.

label.description: Optional short label shown in status responses before unlock. Max 200 chars.

unlock_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the capsule unlocks. Must be at least 1 minute in the future and at most 10 years from now.

items.description: Get real-time token price and market cap

Pay $0.10 USDC to submit a question to a real human community (Discord & Telegram). Returns a token to poll for responses. Status becomes 'ready' once at least 1 human response(s) are collected. Max question length: 2000 characters. Poll GET /status/{token} to check progress and GET /responses/{token} to retrieve answers. Network: Base Mainnet. Useful for human-in-the-loop reviews and preference checks.

body.question: Should we invest in project X? What do humans think?

example.message: Your question has been posted to the human oracle. Use the token to check back for responses.

question.description: Natural-language question to send to human responders in a single request (max 2000 chars)

items.description: Cumulative Volume Delta CVD API: real-time taker buy vs sell volume divergence for Bitcoin BTC and Ethereum ETH. Detects bullish accumulation (price down + CVD up) and bearish exhaustion (price up + CVD down). 1h and 4h divergence signals from Hyperliquid DEX trade flow.

divergence.description: Per-coin CVD divergence signals: signal type, strength, 1h/4h CVD and price change

latest_snapshot.description: Current taker buy/sell volume, net CVD, trade count, and price per coin

items.description: Cryptocurrency liquidation data API: real-time open interest velocity, cascade risk detection, large trade tracking ($50K+) for Bitcoin BTC, Ethereum ETH, and Solana SOL. Market risk and liquidation heatmap data from Hyperliquid DEX.

current_oi.description: Current open interest, mark price, and funding per coin

large_trades_1h.description: Large trades ($50K+) in the last hour

large_trades_24h_count.description: Count of large trades in last 24h

velocity.description: OI rate of change at 5m/1h/24h intervals with cascade risk level

items.description: Cryptocurrency market sentiment analysis API: bullish or bearish signal with strength score, short-term and long-term market direction, contrarian indicator from a weighted multi-analyst panel (KOL signals + on-chain whale stance + contrarian noise sources). Bitcoin and crypto sentiment data for trading agents. Returns composite direction with per-source weighting — a pre-computed consensus view rather than raw feeds.

Real-time cryptocurrency market data API — one-call market snapshot bundle for trading agents. Returns Bitcoin BTC price, Ethereum ETH price, gold XAU price, RSI indicator, market trend direction, perpetual funding rates, open interest, Fear and Greed index, and composite sentiment signal. Live trading data from Hyperliquid DEX. Low-cost gateway endpoint ($0.01) — ideal first call for agents discovering the API surface or building a per-tick decision context.

assets.description: Per-asset price, RSI-14, EMA regime direction, funding rate, open interest

rank.description: The token’s newness rank, determined by timestamp of its first mint

cur.description: The current token price in USD

items.description: Pay $0.10 USDC to schedule a one-shot webhook delivery. Provide a URL and a delay in seconds — the server fires a signed POST to your URL when the timer expires. Automatic retries on failure (up to 3 attempts). Network: Base Mainnet. Each request creates one delayed webhook job and returns identifiers for status checks and cancellation.

example.message: Job scheduled. POST will be sent to your webhook in 3600 seconds.

delay_seconds.description: How many seconds from now to fire the webhook. Minimum 10 seconds, maximum 2592000 (30 days).

name.description: Optional short label used to identify this job in status responses. Max 128 characters.

payload.description: Optional JSON object forwarded unchanged inside the webhook body under the payload key. Max 4 KB.

webhook_url.description: Public http or https URL that will receive the webhook when the timer fires. Private IPs, localhost, and cloud metadata endpoints are blocked.

min_followers.description: Minimum follower count (e.g. 10000 for micro-influencers, 100000 for macro)

items.description: Search Instagram influencers by keyword, category, country, follower range, gender, and more. Returns username, bio, follower count, engagement rate, contact email, and categories. Try free: add ?demo=true for 3 results with no payment.

results.bio: Yoga teacher & filmmaker from Austin TX

city.description: City filter (e.g. 'Los Angeles', 'London'). Works without a keyword query.

country.description: Country — ISO code (US, UK, DE) or full name (United States, Germany)

has_email.description: If true, only return profiles with a public business email — useful for cold-outreach lists.

max_followers.description: Maximum follower count (e.g. 100000 to exclude celebrities and large brands)

min_followers.description: Minimum follower count (e.g. 10000 for micro-influencers, 100000 for macro)

query.description: Text search by name or keyword

items.description: Look up a single Twitter/X tweet by its numeric tweet ID. Returns full tweet data including text, author profile, creation date, engagement metrics (likes, retweets, replies, quotes, bookmarks), and referenced tweets. Query param: id (string, required) - numeric tweet ID, e.g. GET /tweets/by/id?id=1110302988. Returns X v2 API-compatible JSON.

AzurSafe's premium x402-powered real-time risk screening for agentic wallets and autonomous onchain actions. Primarily screens wallet addresses on +30 major blockchains (utxo, evm, sol, xrp, tron and more), with additional support for domains, emails, phone numbers, and usernames. Returns a normalized machine-readable risk result for policy enforcement. Requires identifier query parameter. OpenAPI spec: ai.azursafe.com/openapi.json. More details on ai.azursafe.com

identifier.description: Access AzurSafe's premium screening and intelligence data with x402 for wallets, counterparties, and autonomous transactions. Counterparty identifier to risk-screen before an agent sends, receives, swaps, bridges, or pays. Primarily supports wallet addresses on +30 major blockchains (utxo, evm, sol, xrp, tron and more), with additional support for domains, emails, phone numbers, and usernames. If no result is found, the API returns legitimacyStatus='unknown'. OpenAPI spec: https://ai.azursafe.com/openapi.json. More details on ai.azursafe.com

items.description: Pay $0.01 USDC to store up to 100 KB of text or code. Returns a token for free retrieval anytime via GET /paste/{token}. Network: Base Mainnet. Each request stores one text or code blob and returns a retrieval token, making it useful for notes, code snippets, logs, and debug-output sharing.

example.message: Paste stored. Use GET /paste/{token} to retrieve anytime for free.

content.description: Text or code blob to store and retrieve later by token (max 100 KB)

language.description: Optional language hint for syntax-aware clients (for example 'python', 'json', or 'bash')

items.description: Send an HPKE-encrypted prompt to the Aubrai chat agent running inside a Tinfoil TEE. Only the enclave can decrypt your message.

hpke_ephemeral_public_key.description: Sender's one-time X25519 public key, base64-encoded

items.description: Fetch all user positions with filtering and pagination

Get replies to a specific Twitter/X tweet. Returns paginated reply tweets for a given tweet ID. Query params: id (string, required) - numeric tweet ID; next_token (string, optional) - pagination cursor, e.g. GET /tweets/replies?id=1110302988. Returns X v2 API-compatible JSON.
DeFi yield farming markets with live APYs across Aave V3 and Morpho on Base and Ethereum. Compare rates before depositing idle stablecoins.

Render any URL with Cloudflare Browser Rendering and extract structured JSON via AI. Headless scraping, content extraction, web data — pass ?url= and optional ?prompt=. Drop-in alt to Browserless / ScrapingBee.

content.summary: This domain is for use in illustrative examples in documents.
content.title: Example Domain

items.description: imgzen — gemini-3-pro-image-preview (aka nano-banana-pro), best text rendering by Google — $0.200/image (charged only on success)

image.description: Optional reference image(s) for editing (max 5), supports URL and base64

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate or edit

url.description: Public URL of the generated image (24h TTL)

items.description: Mint a one-hour recording URL the recordee opens in a browser. They speak the optional suggestedText, we transcode their audio to MP3 and PUT it into the StableUpload slot you reserved. The slot's publicUrl is what you'll plug into /api/speech as referenceAudioUrl. Advanced callers may pass requestedExpiresAt only when they also reserved a matching longer StableUpload upload URL and pass its uploadUrlExpiresAt as expiresAt.

body.suggestedText: Hi, I'm leaving you this voice clip so you can clone my voice. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Cellar door.

expiresAt.description: StableUpload uploadUrlExpiresAt value. We clamp the recording-token TTL to this value. Do not pass StableUpload's public-file retention expiresAt.

postFields.description: Required form fields when posting to postUrl.

postUrl.description: Presigned POST URL from StableUpload. Pair with postFields.

publicUrl.description: StableUpload public URL where the resulting MP3 will live. Must end with .mp3.

requestedExpiresAt.description: Advanced optional epoch timestamp, seconds or milliseconds, for an explicit recording-link expiry. Default is 1 hour; max is 24 hours and still clamped to StableUpload uploadUrlExpiresAt.

speakerLabel.description: Optional name shown on the recording page ("Recording for: …").

suggestedText.description: Optional script the recordee will see on the recording page (max 500 chars). Improves clone quality with consistent prosody.

uploadUrl.description: Presigned PUT URL from StableUpload. Provide either uploadUrl or postUrl+postFields.

items.description: Semantic recall over a Vectorize-backed PQC knowledge index — RAG-as-a-service. Pass ?q= for vector search across NIST FIPS 203/204/205 specs, x402 protocol docs, and curated PQC research.
Korean exchange prices (Upbit, Bithumb) for a single token in KRW

Verify caller trust from real-time Cloudflare edge signals (TLS, HTTP protocol, geo, ASN). Returns a 0–1 trust score. Bot detection / KYA / handshake verification at $0.005 per call.
Cheapest LLM on CDP x402 Bazaar. OpenAI-compatible chat completion via Llama 3.3 70B (Venice AI). Supports tools/tool_choice for function calling and stream:true SSE passthrough.
